mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM study WHERE status IN ('RECRUITING', 'IN_PROGRESS')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT DATE(created_at) as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM user WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM study GROUP BY status
SELECT COALESCE(provider, 'EMAIL') as method, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as count FROM user_social_account GROUP BY provider

SELECT DATE(last_reviewed_at) as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM user_review_items WHERE last_reviewed_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND last_reviewed_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE(last_reviewed_at) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT qc.name as courseName, COUNT(DISTINCT uri.user_id) as participantCount FROM user_review_items uri JOIN quiz_course_question qcq ON uri.content_id = qcq.id AND uri.content_type = 'COURSE_QUESTION' JOIN quiz_course qc ON qcq.quiz_course_id = qc.id GROUP BY qc.id, qc.name ORDER BY participantCount DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT u.id, u.nickname, u.email, COALESCE(usa.provider, 'EMAIL') as loginMethod, u.created_at as createdAt FROM user u LEFT JOIN user_social_account usa ON u.id = usa.user_id ORDER BY u.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT s.id, s.name, t.name as topicName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM study_member sm WHERE sm.study_id = s.id AND sm.status = 'ACTIVE') as memberCount, s.status FROM study s LEFT JOIN topic t ON s.topic_id = t.id ORDER BY memberCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DATE(started_at) as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM meeting WHERE started_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND status IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'ENDED') GROUP BY DATE(started_at) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT DATE(checked_at) as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM attendance WHERE checked_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND status IN ('PRESENT', 'LATE') GROUP BY DATE(checked_at) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT contribution_date as date, SUM(activity_count) as count FROM daily_contribution WHERE contribution_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY contribution_date ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT level, level_name as levelName, COUNT(*) as count FROM user_stats GROUP BY level, level_name ORDER BY level ASC
SELECT t.name as topicName, COUNT(s.id) as count FROM study s JOIN topic t ON s.topic_id = t.id GROUP BY t.id, t.name ORDER BY count DESC
